context: Verify that the agent does not pass an author name to the author subcommand, instead locating the numeric author ID first via search, then fetching the full profile.

checklist.name: Agent recognises that author subcommand requires an ID, not a name
checklist.description: The agent does not attempt to run 'author --author-id "Noam Shazeer"'. It explicitly notes that a numeric Semantic Scholar author ID is required.

checklist.name: search subcommand used to locate the author ID
checklist.description: The agent runs a keyword or paper search and extracts the authorId field from the response to find Noam Shazeer's Semantic Scholar author ID.

checklist.name: author subcommand called with the correct numeric author ID
checklist.description: After locating the ID, the agent calls 'author --author-id <numeric-id>' with the correct ID found in the previous step.

checklist.name: Profile output includes h-index and publications
checklist.description: The agent presents at minimum the author's h-index and a list of recent publications from the API response.
